note: The source fixture is GENERATED at test-runtime (not committed) by padding the canonical happy-path plaintext to >1 MB. Design doc §5.4 caps uploads at 1 MB, so the importer rejects before extraction.
generation_recipe: Take happy_path/happy_plaintext.txt and append enough filler prose to exceed 1,048,576 bytes. The content beyond the cap is irrelevant; the rejection happens at the byte-count check.
